source.description: Six-panel raster marker contact sheet generated for the July 1, 2026 whoopee cushion sticker lesson.
source.notes: Replaced the earlier pinched-center sheet with the tongue-out, multiple-puff variation preferred by the owner.

process_strategy: The sequence establishes the cushion body and nozzle first, adds the outline, then adds the face, tongue, folds, puff clouds, color, and highlights before the final panel only reinforces existing ink, color, and shine marks.

final_elements.name: round cushion body
final_elements.description: A flattened round cushion body tilted slightly on the page.

final_elements.name: pinched nozzle
final_elements.description: A small pinched nozzle extending from one side of the cushion.

final_elements.name: squashed cushion contour
final_elements.description: A lumpy, squashed outside edge that makes the cushion look soft.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold marker outline around the cushion body and nozzle.

final_elements.name: wrinkle folds
final_elements.description: Short curved fold lines on the cushion surface.

final_elements.name: tongue-out goofy face
final_elements.description: Two wide eyes, a big open smile, and a tongue on the cushion body.

final_elements.name: multiple puff clouds
final_elements.description: Two small comic puff clouds coming from the nozzle.

final_elements.name: red marker fill
final_elements.description: Bright red marker fill inside the already drawn cushion and nozzle.

final_elements.name: pink shadow and white highlights
final_elements.description: Pink shadow accents and small shine marks on existing cushion, tongue, and puff shapes.

frames.visible_job: Places the flattened round cushion guide and pinched nozzle guide without requiring a permanent center pinch mark.
Turns the guide into a lumpy squashed cushion contour and clearer open nozzle.
Thickens only the existing cushion and nozzle edges into a bold black outline.
Adds wrinkle folds, the tongue-out face, and multiple puff clouds around the existing nozzle.
Fills the established cushion with red marker and adds pink shadow, tongue color, puff color, and small highlights.

final_step.visible_job: Retraces existing outlines, deepens marker fill, and clarifies the tongue, folds, puff clouds, shadows, and highlights already placed.

rejection_checks: No cushion body, nozzle, fold, face, tongue, puff cloud, color area, or highlight should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink or color a shape that was not already visible earlier.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same cushion pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
